name: 24pk Tealight Vanilla Bean and Amber/Cozy Cashmere/Ashwood Candle - Threshold™: Palm Oil & Paraffin Wax, 4hr Burn Time
description:
Brighten up your indoor and outdoor spaces instantly with this 24-Pack of Tealight Candles from Threshold™. Great for everyday use or special occasions, this pack of cylindrical tealights in three colors brings warm style to any space. They feature the lovely scents of vanilla bean & amber, cozy cashmere and ashwood & palo santo to help you create a lovely ambiance, and each one burns for up to 4 hours.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
